meta.name: Niri Scrollable Rice
meta.description: A self-contained niri desktop with the Noctalia shell — bar, launcher, notifications and a settings GUI, all declared here.

settings.label: Display scale
settings.description: UI scale for HiDPI screens. 100% auto-detects.

files.content:
font=JetBrainsMono Nerd Font:size=11
pad=12x12
[colors-dark]
alpha={{opacity}}
background=1e1e2e
foreground=cdd6f4

# Managed by Manifest OS — swaylock
color=1e1e2e
font=JetBrainsMono Nerd Font
indicator-radius=120
indicator-thickness=10
ring-color=45475a
ring-clear-color=a6e3a1
ring-ver-color=89b4fa
ring-wrong-color=f38ba8
key-hl-color=cba6f7
bs-hl-color=f38ba8
inside-color=1e1e2ecc
inside-clear-color=a6e3a1
inside-ver-color=89b4fa
inside-wrong-color=f38ba8
text-color=cdd6f4
text-clear-color=1e1e2e
text-ver-color=1e1e2e
text-wrong-color=1e1e2e
line-uses-inside
show-failed-attempts
ignore-empty-password
image=/usr/share/backgrounds/manifest/current
scaling=fill
